title: Section 12A
content: 1 2 [12A. Salaries of the Judges.―(1) There shall be paid to the Chief Justice of India, by way of salary, 3 [ 4 [two lakh eighty thousand rupees per mensem]]. (2) There shall be paid to a Judge of the Supreme Court, by way of salary, 5 [ 6 [two lakh fifty thousand rupees per mensem] ].
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 18 of 1998, s. 7, for the heading "PENSIONS" (w.e.f. 1-1-1996). 2. Ins. by s. 7, ibid. (w.e.f. 1-1-1996). 3. Subs. by Act 23 of 2009, s. 8, for "thirty-three thousand rupees per mensem" (w.e.f. 1-1-2006). 4. Subs. by Act 10 of 2018, s. 6, for "one lakh rupees per mensem" (w.e.f. 1-1-2016). 5. Subs. by Act 23 of 2009, s. 8, for "thirty thousand rupees per mensem" (w.e.f. 1-1-2006). 6. Subs. by Act 10 of 2018, s 6, for "ninety thousand rupees per mensem" (w.e.f. 1-1-2016).
